steps.title: Find the parallel structure requirement
steps.content: The word “and” joins two coordinate actions: “He applied... and [BLANK] them...” Both verbs must use the same grammatical form.

steps.title: Match with the past tense verb
steps.content: ”suspended” is the past tense form that parallels “applied.” The other choices use infinitive or participle forms that break this parallel structure. That confirms D is correct.
